basePrompt: Use the exact same matte gray male mannequin, sculpted gray dress shirt, sculpted gray chino pants, belt, wardrobe, neutral standing pose, and medium shot waist-up framing from the reference image. Pure photographic cinematic color grading reference still. Zero typography: no text, letters, words, numbers, captions, labels, watermarks, logos, signage, UI overlays. Cinematic 35mm lens. The color grade and mood is the primary subject:

categories.clause: natural daylight color grades — warm golden sunset glow on mannequin and studio, bright airy high-key luminance, readable warm-cool daylight mood
shadow-forward cinematic grades — deep noir chiaroscuro contrast, backlit silhouette rim edges, bleak cool desaturated overcast mood
vintage print film color grades — faded warm archival tones, punchy classic photochemical saturation, antique sepia warmth, gritty bleach-bypass desaturation
blockbuster commercial color grades — teal shadows with orange highlights, desaturated epic restraint, warm sun-drenched hero tones
neon and night moods — electric magenta-cyan city glow, warm tungsten practical intimacy, amber sodium streetlight haze
surreal color FX grades — infrared false-color magenta foliage tones, thermal heat-map gradients, night-vision green phosphor cast, bold duotone split, selective vivid accent on monochrome
world-building palettes — lush saturated eco greens, brass steampunk warmth, phosphor green terminal cast, whimsical pastel production design, cold nordic noir desaturation

recipes.clause: warm dusk golden hour color grade — rich amber sunset glow, long soft shadows, magic hour warmth on mannequin face and gray studio
cool twilight blue hour color grade — deep blue ambient skylight, desaturated cool tones, civil twilight mood on mannequin and studio
bright airy high-key daylight grade — luminous clean whites, low contrast, open even exposure, fresh morning clarity

backlit silhouette monochrome grade — subject dark graphic shape against bright background, crisp rim light outlining head and shoulders
bleak overcast grade — heavily desaturated cool grays, flat diffused light, muted hopeless atmosphere
vintage archive warmth grade — faded warm photograph tones, gentle fade, nostalgic print yellowing
hyper classic Hollywood grade — rich warm skin-adjacent tones with cool shadow accents, punchy photochemical saturation
antique tint grade — sepia-leaning paper warmth, aged photograph brown-gold toning across entire frame
silver grit bleach bypass grade — desaturated high contrast, metallic silvery mid-tones, gritty crushed color
complementary punch blockbuster grade — teal cyan shadows, warm orange highlights, commercial color contrast
desaturated epic blockbuster grade — restrained muted palette, cool dawn mist, cinematic scale through subdued color
warm hero blockbuster grade — sun-drenched golden warmth, rich sunset skin-tone warmth on mannequin and environment
electric city neon grade — hyper-saturated magenta and cyan split lighting, rainy neon reflections, cyberpunk night glow
tungsten glow night grade — warm amber practical lamp light, dark interior, intimate low-key warmth
street sodium grade — orange sodium vapor streetlight cast, foggy amber urban night haze
candle intimacy grade — soft warm candlelight glow, deep shadows, flickering warm practical falloff on face

eco bright world grade — lush saturated greens, sunlit clarity, vibrant natural green color cast on studio environment
brass age steampunk grade — warm brass and copper industrial tones, dusty amber-brown atmosphere
